name: Reflag
description: TypeScript-first feature flag platform with self-cleaning flags. Agent automatically archives stale flags and generates GitHub PRs to remove obsolete code.

Auto-generate GitHub PRs to remove obsolete flag code
Keep codebase clean by eliminating flag tech debt

pros: TypeScript-first SDK ergonomics for modern stacks
Agent archives stale flags and opens cleanup PRs
Clean developer UX aimed at product teams
cons: Opinionated workflow may not fit all teams
